title: Geodis India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Geodis India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
